reviews.comment: My mom actually recommended me to use Frederick Window Tinting based on some history she had with them, and her recommendation did not disappoint. I called just before 10am on 8/23 and left a voicemail. They responded back in less than 5 minutes with a text saying they had appointments available that same afternoon! I had some meetings and couldn’t make it that same day, but ended up going in 2 days later. Sharyn used a lamp to show me the different films and how they rejected heat, which helped make my decision on what to choose. Danny then applied the tint, and it looked phenomenal. They both also explained the processes, best practices, and proper care for the tint when finished. They even let me take pictures with their logo in the background for social media! Honestly, in today’s world where so many businesses no longer care about the quality of their product nor do they want to be accountable to the services they provide, Frederick Window Tinting stands out immensely and proves that there ARE businesses out there that still care about doing excellent work! Thank you so much, FWT.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you and your mom! We're so glad you came in!

reviews.comment: Picked out the S9 for the 90% UV protection. Turns out I had old tint and a bunch of leftover glue from the previous owner, I gladly paid the fee to have it removed and cleaned up before install. They were quick, efficient, and attention to detail was incredible. This is the second vehicle I’ve had tinted there. They are a family run shop, they do great work and they have a cash discount that I happily pay. Good tint ain’t cheap, cheap tint ain’t good.

reviewReply.comment: We appreciate your kind words and look forward to seeing you again in the future!
